creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Wed May  1 23:15:54 2013
New Revision: 317062
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317062

Log:
  - Update to 10.0.0
  
  PR:		ports/178135
  Submitted by:	Kuan-Chung Chiu <buganini@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/converters/py-bsdconv/Makefile
  head/converters/py-bsdconv/distinfo

Modified: head/converters/py-bsdconv/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/converters/py-bsdconv/Makefile	Wed May  1 23:15:14 2013	(r317061)
+++ head/converters/py-bsdconv/Makefile	Wed May  1 23:15:54 2013	(r317062)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	bsdconv
-PORTVERSION=	9.0
+PORTVERSION=	10.0.0
 CATEGORIES=	converters python
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	${GH_ACCOUNT}-${GH_PROJECT}-${PORTVERSION}-0-g${GH_COMMIT}
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	bsdconv:${PORTSDIR}/convert
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	buganini
+GH_COMMIT=	e28674b
 GH_PROJECT=	python-${PORTNAME}
-GH_COMMIT=	2fcf39c
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes

==============================================================================
